title: Andosha II

{{Quote|'Some of us still have a sense of loyalty to the Republic, and do not want to be branded as traitors,' said Aqualish Senator Gorothin Vagger (Andosha II) at a loyalty summit on the Andosha II colony world.|HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Andosha II''' was an [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] [[Colonist/Legends|colony]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Lambda sector/Legends|Lambda sector]], on the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|hyperlane]]. It was a part of the [[Andoan Free Colonies/Legends|Andoan Free Colonies]], which during the last [[Standard century/Legends|century]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] struggled against the Aqualish of the planet [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] and the [[Spiverelda/Legends|worlds]] it held influence over. As part of that struggle, the Andoan-affiliated [[Harch/Legends|Harch]] [[Trench/Legends|Trench]] led raids against Andosha II.

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], after Ando had [[Secession of Ando|seceded]] from the Republic, the Andoan Free Colonies held a [[Andosha II loyalty summit|loyalty summit]] on Andosha II. During that event, the planet's [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Gorothin Vagger]] reaffirmed the dedication of the Colonies to remain members of the Republic.

==Description==
Andosha II,<ref name="HNN" /> also known simply as Andosha,<ref name="EGTW" /> was a terrestrial [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="HNN" /> located in the [[Andosha system/Legends|Andosha system]], a part of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Lambda sector/Legends|Lambda sector]].<ref name="EAOC" /> Occupying the second [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position in its [[Star system/Legends|star system]],<ref name="HNN" /> Andosha II was situated on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Horos Spine]].<ref name="EGTW" /> It also lay on the [[Corellian Run/Legends|Corellian Run]] [[Super-hyperroute/Legends|super-hyperroute]], which connected it to the [[Algaran system|Algaran]] and [[Mon Gazza system/Legends|Mon Gazza systems]] and served as a dividing line between [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] and [[Trailing Sectors/Legends|Trailing Sectors]] portions of the Mid Rim.<ref name="TEA Andosha" />

==History==
{{Quote|The Andoan Free Colonies asserted their loyalty to the Republic, despite the formal secession of their parent world. ''[…]'' The Colonies, established over 80 standard years ago, encompass 15 planets in the Mid Rim.|HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN" />}}
[[Colonist/Legends|Colonized]] by [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] settlers from the planet [[Ando/Legends|Ando]],<ref name="HNN" /> Andosha II became a part of the [[Spiverelda/Legends|Spiverelda]],<ref name="Spiverelda" /> the group of Aqualish worlds that fell under Andoan influence.<ref name="EGTW" /> Eventually, however, Andosha II came to be a member of the [[Andoan Free Colonies/Legends|Andoan Free Colonies]], a group of fifteen planets<ref name="CSWE" /> established at some point by [[102 BBY/Legends|102 BBY]].<ref name="102 BBY">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|regional/13328_1.html|Andoan Free Colonies Criticize Aqualish}}, which is set on the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] "13:3:28," establishes that the [[Andoan Free Colonies/Legends|Andoan Free Colonies]] were formed more than 80 [[Standard year/Legends|standard years]] prior. Since 13:3:28 corresponds to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]], the Free Colonies must have been established at some point by [[102 BBY/Legends|102 BBY]].</ref> During the last [[Standard century/Legends|century]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] existence and before the outbreak of the [[Andoan Wars/Legends|Andoan Wars]] in [[57 BBY/Legends|57 BBY]], relations between Ando and the Andoan Free Colonies had soured to the point of continuous armed struggle in which the [[Harch/Legends|Harch]] military leader [[Trench/Legends|Trench]] led Andoan raiders against the Colonies, advancing along the Horos Spine to Andosha II.<ref name="EGTW" />

[[File:Gorothin_Vagger.png|thumb|right|300px|Andosha II was represented by Republic Senator Gorothin Vagger (on the right).]]
In [[39 BBY/Legends|39 BBY]], the conflict ended on the eve of Andoan victory via Republic intervention that saw the separation of Ando and the Andoan Free Colonies. As a result, over the subsequent [[Standard decade/Legends|decade]] the leadership of Ando became radicalized,<ref name="EGTW" /> and in [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]],<ref name="23 BBY">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|45|news/13228_1.html|Ando, Sy Myrth Secede}}, which is set on the [[Standard day/Legends|day]] [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] [[Ando separation|seceded]] from the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], is dated to the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] "13:2:28," which corresponds to [[23 BBY/Legends|23 BBY]] per the reasoning [[Template:YearMathGRS|here]]. In addition, the [[Andosha II loyalty summit]] was reported on in {{HoloNetNewsWeb|49|regional/13328_1.html|Andoan Free Colonies Criticize Aqualish}}, which is set on the date "[[22 BBY/Legends|13:3:28]]."</ref> Ando formally [[Secession of Ando|seceded]] from the Republic.<ref name="HNN" /> In response,<ref name="HNN" /> in the [[22 BBY/Legends|following month]]<ref name="23 BBY" /> the Andoan Free Colonies held a [[Andosha II loyalty summit|loyalty summit]] on Andosha II.<ref name="HNN" />

During the event, the representatives of the Colonies expressed their commitment to remain members of the Republic, and Andosha II's [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Gorothin Vagger]] condemned the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|secession]] of Ando, vocalizing both their faith in the Republic and its institutions and their determination to attend on<ref name="HNN" /> the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] planet<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] the upcoming<ref name="HNN" /> [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] vote on the proposed [[Military Creation Act/Legends|Military Creation Act]].<ref name="Vote">{{HoloNetNewsWeb|46|news/1337_1.html|Palpatine Sets Army Vote Date}}</ref> Both the loyalty summit and Vagger's remarks were later reported on from Andosha II's [[Andobi Exa]] in an issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]].<ref name="HNN" />

==Behind the scenes==
Andosha II was first mentioned in [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 49|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #49'']], an [[in-universe]] issue of the HoloNet News<ref name="HNN" /> written by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]]<ref name="Credits">{{HoloNetNewsWeb||credits.html|Credits}}</ref> and published on the [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News website]] on [[March 28]], [[2002]].<ref name="HNN49 date">{{JCFCite|url=posts/6217551|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=Dev Sibwarra|date=2002-03-28|time=4:24 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20200305125429/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-13}}</ref> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Andosha system, and therefore Andosha II, in grid square P-15,<ref name="TEA Andosha" /> and the [[2012]] reference book ''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'', authored by [[Jason Fry]] and [[Paul R. Urquhart]], ultimately confirmed "Andosha" as an alternate name for the world.<ref name="EGTW" />
